titleStmt.title: SII 30.269: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 269. (A.R. No. 621 of 1915.) Aṉṉiyūr, Villupuram Taluk, South Arcot District. RAmanāthēśvara Temple-inside the Natarāja shrine. Vīrapratāpa Achutadēva mahārāya: Śaka 1300 kalveṭṭil 1003 eṉṟu uḷḷatu., (mistake for 1464) Blava, ṭai, Paurṇami, Pushya, Monday.: 1543 ā.D. ṣaturday, ñan. 20.

summary.p: Records the gift of six villages Aṉṉiyūr, Tirukuṉṟam, Veḷḷērippaṭṭi, Kañjalūr, Aruṇāvaram and one more village the name of which is not traceable, to the temple of Tiruvirāmīsuramuḍaiya nāyaṉār at Aṉṉiyūr in the Karuvākshi Sīrmai after having reconsecrated the temple for the merit of certain Segatāpi Nāgarāsar. This gift was made most probably to meet the expenses of pūjas, repair works etc. of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maṉ makāmaṇṭaleśvara vīrapiratāpa śrīaccutateva makārayar pirativiṟācciyam paṇṇi
aruḷāniṉṟa cakāpttam 1000 3 Itiṉmel cellāniṉṟa pava śrī taiyi mātam pavarnami pūca naṣattiṟam cen=ta co
mavāra nāḷ śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecuraṉ ṟāciyapāram paṇṇiṉa cekatāpa nākarācā tarmamāka karu
vākṣi cimai Aṉṉiyūr tirurāmīcuvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku puṉap piratiṣṭai paṇṇi vaccu
kku pūcaikku tiruppaṇikkum Aṅkaraṅka vaipokattukkumāka Ācan=taṟākkamāyi naṭakkum
paṭiyāyi yiṭṭa kirāmaṅkaḷ Aṉṉiyūr tirukuṉṟam veḷḷeripaṭṭi laci cto cattu nā
ṅkaḷ kañcalūriluṇṭāṉa tevatāṉam Aruṇāvaram yin=ta Āṟu kiṟāmattiluṇṭāṉa nañcai puñcai
mutallaiyūr caruvamāṉiyamāka viṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle yinta tarmattukku yātoruvar
Akitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ kaṅkaikaraiyile kārāmpacuvaiyum piṟāmaṇaṉaiyum ko
ṇṇa pāvattile pokakaṭavatākavum
Digital edition of SII 30.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
